titleStmt.title: SII 33.204: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 204. (A.R. No. B 347 of 1951.) Śrīraṅgam, Tiruchinapalli Taluk and District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: On the gold pot in the Śri Raṅganāthaswāmi temple.
This bears the date Vikṛiti, Bhādrapada ba. 2.

States that this (the gold pot), which weighs 12,515 varāha and was stolen by thieves, was recovered, re-done and restored to the temple by Raṅgappa-oḍeya. It was stolen in the year Vikṛiti, on the 2nd day of the dark fortnight of Bhādrapada, during the reign of Vijayaraṅga Chokkanātha-nāyaka son of Viśvanātha-nāyaka. Tupākul Rāmakṛishṇappa-nāyudu recovered and restored it to the temple again. Published: S.I.I., Vol., XXIV, No. 573.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
samukhaṁ
śrīraṁganāyakulaku raṁgappayyagāri vubhayaṁ
pannereṁḍu vēlunnēnūṭapadihēnu varālayettu yī biṁde yevarainā Āśiṁci yettitē gaṁggalō kapila dhēnuvunanu caṁppina pāpānapōgalavāru
cōrakulu yettukonirāgā pāḷina kanipeṭṭi raṁggappa kāḷākatōḷavoḍayāri vāru maḷḷinni lessacēyiṁcci sannidhiki Aṁppina biṁde i.e. pāḷyamuna; pāḷyaṁ stands for ūdaiyarpalayam.
vikṛtināma saṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 2 lu śrīmadviśvanāthanāyani vijayaraṁgga cokkanāthanāyanivāri dināla śrīraṁgganāyakula baṁgāru biṁde
cōrakulu koṁccupōyivuṁḍḍaṁgā tupākularāmakṛṣṇappanāyanivāru teppiṁci samarppiṁcināru
Digital edition of SII 33.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
